body:
Have you ever been to Hiroshima and Miyajima? 🌟 If not, you’re in for a treat! 🌸

This is Miyajima, an island located just a short ferry ride away from Hiroshima city 🚢. 
It’s famous for its stunning Itsukushima Shrine 🏯, known for its giant torii gate that seems to float on the water during high tide. 🌊 
The view of the torii against the backdrop of Mount Misen 🏔️ is absolutely breathtaking, and it's one of Japan’s most iconic sights!

The island itself is full of beauty, with lush forests, peaceful walking trails 🌿, and friendly wild deer roaming freely 🦌. 
Miyajima has a peaceful, spiritual atmosphere that makes it the perfect escape from the hustle and bustle of the city.

Have you had the chance to visit Itsukushima Shrine or take the ferry over to Miyajima? 🚢 
We’d love to hear about your experiences! 😊
・
・
JAPAN PANORAMIC TOURS
Operating 1day bus tours to Mt.Fuji & Hakone🗻🚢
Tokyo🗼, Kyoto👘, Hiroshima🍁,
Nara🦌Shirakawa-go & Kanazawa❄🏘
🎉🚌 Explore Hiroshima like never before! 🎉🌸
Hurry up and get yourself booked!→http://bit.ly/4gP8
TqE
・
・
#japanpanoramictours #bustour #japantrip #japantravel
#japon #instajapan #nippon #explorejapan #visitjapan
#japanlife #japantravelphoto #japanphoto #japanese
#lovetravel #hiroshima #hiroshimajapan #miyajima
#MiyajimaViews #peacefulhiroshima #atomicbombdome
#itsukushimashrine #shrine #toriigate #cruise

body:
⛩️🇯🇵Esploriamo il tempio Daishō-in, un luogo nascosto di spiritualità sul Monte Misen.
Le statue giapponesi che popolano questo sito sacro hanno volti unici, ognuna con una espressione diversa.
Giappone, spiritualità, tradizione e bellezza si mescolano in questo angolo di pace, dove ogni statua racconta una storia silenziosa.

Un'esperienza unica che ti fa riflettere sul significato profondo del buddhismo giapponese e della spiritualità orientale.

Chi ha mai visto una statua così? 
📍Curioso di sapere dove si trova questo posto? Commenta sotto e ti dirò le coordinate precise!
------------
A hidden gem at Daishō-in Temple, a spiritual place at the foot of Mount Misen.
The Japanese statues that adorn this sacred site have unique faces, each with a different expression.
Japan, spirituality, tradition, and beauty blend together in this peaceful corner, where each statue tells a silent story.

A unique experience that makes you reflect on the deep meaning of Japanese Buddhism and Eastern spirituality.
Have you ever seen a statue like this? ✨
Curious to know where this place is? Comment below and I'll tell you the exact coordinates!

#Salva questo posto per il tuo prossimo viaggio in Giappone!
#SaveThisSpot for your next Japan trip!

#Daishoin #MiyajimaIsland #HiddenJapan #JapanReels #SpiritualJapan #JapanVibes #TempliGiapponesi #StatueGiapponesi #MonteMisen #Giappone #ExploreJapan #TravelReels #SpiritualJourney #JapanCulture #ViaggioInGiappone #WondersOfJapan #JapanBucketList #GiapponeMagico #TravelJapan #DiscoverJapan #viaggiingiappone

body:
Si vous voyagez au Japon, ne passez pas à côté de l’île de Miyajima, proche d’Hiroshima.⛩️

On y découvre l’un des symboles du pays : le torii flottant du sanctuaire d’Itsukushima, dressé sur la mer depuis plus de 800 ans et classé à l’UNESCO.

Mais l’île ne s’arrête pas à cette image iconique. 
En montant vers le mont Misen, on croise des daims en liberté et des forêts paisibles avant d’atteindre le temple bouddhiste Daishō-in, fondé au IXe siècle par le grand moine Kūkai. 
Ses statues, ses salles de prières et ses escaliers bordés de sutras en font l’un des temples les plus impressionnants du Japon.

Pour moi, Miyajima est une étape incontournable d’un voyage au Japon.

Abonnez-vous pour découvrir avec moi les autres trésors cachés du Japon 🇯🇵 

#japan #visitjapan #japantravel #explorejapan #travel #miyajima #itsukushima #toriigate #wanderlustjapan #naturelovers #japaneseculture #buddhisttemple #hiddenjapan

body:
【Autumn Magic in Miyajima 🍁】
Nestled at the foot of Mt. Misen and just a short walk from the famous Itsukushima Shrine with the floating torii gate, you can find Momijidani Park. Every year during the autumn season, this lovely valley transforms into a tapestry of reds, oranges, and golds, thanks to about 700 vividly colored maple trees. The fiery leaves contrast beautifully with evergreens and mossy stones, and the Momiji Bridge at the entrance frames it all like a painting 💛

When dusk falls, an illumination event is held from November 8 (Sat) to November 30 (Sun), and you can enjoy the glowing lights. Go on a romantic, serene, and magical stroll under hundreds of glowing maples 🌙

body:
A Cozy Vegan-Friendly Tea House at Daishoin Temple 🍛🍜

Right inside the main gate of Daishoin Temple—famous for its Buddhist statues wearing colorful knit hats—you’ll find Rokkaku Saburo (Hexagon Cafe), a peaceful spot to recharge after exploring the temple grounds or hiking down from Mt. Misen.

Since taking over the cafe, owner-chef Okita-san has been dedicated to offering delicious vegan options. Her beautifully presented vegan curry, made with chickpeas, soy meat, nuts, veggies, and spices, has become a favorite. Now, she’s added a creamy soy milk-based vegan ramen topped with locally sourced maitake mushrooms—a must-try! 🍜✨

Hexagon is also a My Mizu refill station, so feel free to stop by and refill your water bottle to help reduce plastic waste. ♻️💧

🌱- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

📍 Rokkaku Saburo (Hexagon Cafe), Daishoin Temple
🕐 10:00-17:00
🗓️ Closed occasionally *Best to check on their Instagram
🗺️ https://maps.app.goo.gl/GBmjhJ2sJJyrZUeN9
📸 IG: @hexagon.cafe

🌱- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

#VeganHiroshima

Sign up to explore the release now and secure your access.

body:
A Must-Visit Vegan Spot on Miyajima! 🌱🍛🍦

Tucked away near Momijidani Park, Sonoma is a cozy little shop filled with handmade goods, unique finds, and delicious vegan-friendly treats. Noticing how tough it was for vegans to find food on the island, the young couple who run the store decided to step up!

Now, they offer organic soy gelato, amazake malted rice drinks, and two tasty vegan curries—a three-bean curry and a spinach curry, both served with rice. You’ll also find a variety of healthy drinks, and while some contain honey, the friendly staff will guide you to the vegan options.

Looking for a quick bite? Sonoma stocks T’s vegan instant noodles, perfect for eating in or taking away. Don’t forget to check out their vegan snacks at the counter too!

📍 Find them on the path behind Itsukushima Shrine, just before the Mt. Misen ropeway shuttle stop.

🌱- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

📍 Sonoma, Miyajima
🗓️ Closed Wednesday & Sunday (Open on Sundays during high season)
🗺️ https://maps.app.goo.gl/zPggtZXYe5dbne3u8
📸 IG: @sonoma_miyajima

🌱- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

#VeganHiroshima

body:
🍷 Léoville Las Cases 1996
🍷 L’Église-Clinet 2009

The Léoville was a deep garnet, with a clear brick at the rim. Aromas of blackcurrant, cedar, tobacco, cocoa, leather and graphite, having had the 05,09&10 previously this was one I was keen to compare and it delivered. Still fresh, acidic and well structured, I could go back to this regularly. 

I was advised the L’Église is the kind of wine you have sat next to the fire, reading a book or having a philosophical chat….so that’s exactly what I did. It was all plum, dark cherry, cocoa with polished tannins, it was plush, ripe and silky, with a long finish. 

LLC received mainly 97-98 points 
LE received numerous 100 points 

#bordeaux #pomerol #leftbank #righbank #winecollecting

body:
【Autumn Magic in Miyajima 🍁】
Nestled at the foot of Mt. Misen and just a short walk from the famous Itsukushima Shrine with the floating torii gate, you can find Momijidani Park. Every year during the autumn season, this lovely valley transforms into a tapestry of reds, oranges, and golds, thanks to about 700 vividly colored maple trees. The fiery leaves contrast beautifully with evergreens and mossy stones, and the Momiji Bridge at the entrance frames it all like a painting 💛

When dusk falls, an illumination event is held from November 8 (Sat) to November 30 (Sun), and you can enjoy the glowing lights. Go on a romantic, serene, and magical stroll under hundreds of glowing maples 🌙

#setouchi #setouchitrip #setoinlandsea #visitjapanjp #japantrip 
#momijidani #miyajima #autumnlightup #autumnillumination #japaninautumn #hiroshima #hiroshimaprefecture #nature

body:
【Autumn Magic in Miyajima 🍁】
Nestled at the foot of Mt. Misen and just a short walk from the famous Itsukushima Shrine with the floating torii gate, you can find Momijidani Park. Every year during the autumn season, this lovely valley transforms into a tapestry of reds, oranges, and golds, thanks to about 700 vividly colored maple trees. The fiery leaves contrast beautifully with evergreens and mossy stones, and the Momiji Bridge at the entrance frames it all like a painting 💛

When dusk falls, an illumination event is held from November 8 (Sat) to November 30 (Sun), and you can enjoy the glowing lights. Go on a romantic, serene, and magical stroll under hundreds of glowing maples 🌙

body: On her daughter Lizzy’s birthday, Eleanor receives a video call from Lizzy, revealing she’s been locked alone in a car under the scorching sun, on the verge of death. Meanwhile, her husband Mason is at an amusement park with Selene, the widow of his late best friend, and her daughter Dolly. As Eleanor desperately searches for her daughter, she faces deception and suppression from those around her. Emotionally shattered, Eleanor gets help from Benjamin, a surgeon and her former junior schoolmate. They find Lizzy trapped in Selene’s car, suffering from heatstroke and unconscious—but it’s too late. Lizzy tragically dies. After reading Lizzy’s diary, Eleanor resolves to divorce Mason, ending a marriage filled with deceit and indifference.

The wait is over - Bordeaux En Primeur 2024 has officially launched for Crurated members.

This is a unique opportunity for collectors and fine wine enthusiasts to gain early access to limited releases from some of the region’s most renowned producers.

Here’s what’s new this year:
- Access to allocations from estates including Lafite Rothschild, Montrose, Le Pin & more
- Personalized formats - Start collecting from a single bottle

With limited quantities available, Crurated provides a curated gateway into the world of Bordeaux, built for those who value rarity and provenance.

Sign up to explore the release now and secure your access.
